title: Robin Williams loves NGE
wikitext:
[]: Robin Williams loves NGE             Quote Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 8:51 am I find that interesting If he were in a live action Eva movie, who would he portray?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 8:56 am Lilith would be my pick

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:02 am He auditioned to be Gendo for Rebuild of Evangelion but didn't get the part and in some movie he was in (I forget the name) his character buys an Eva figure that (IIRC) he owns IRL.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:08 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: He auditioned to be Gendo for Rebuild of Evangelion but didn't get the part and in some movie he was in (I forget the name) his character buys an Eva figure that (IIRC) he owns IRL.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:11 am I wonder what he'd adblib to "the truth is" part

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:11 am Robin Williams an Eva fan? Never would have guessed. He could play any character, as far as I'm concerned. He can do it. His looks, though, make him hard to place. He's Robin Williams, instantly recognized as something completely different from a world of Evas and Angels. Where do you put him in the world of Eva? I surly don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:13 am Robin Williams as Gendo (Voice): It could work. Robin Williams in a crappy live action adaption of Evangelion as Gendo: Nah... I see him more as Fuyutsuki for a live action role.

[]:             Quote Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:34 am Live action- how about chairman Kiel Ritsugo Akagi...the truth is... it's flying rubber. It's... Flubber!

[]: Re: Robin Williams loves NGE             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:08 am Mortician69 wrote: I find that interesting If he were in a live action Eva movie, who would he portray?

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:12 am Robin Williams could actually do a good job voicing Gendo (I'd like to hear the outtakes from *that*; he'd make dubbing EoE bearable): he's done some dramatic stuff and was surprisingly very good. Case in point, he played a silken-voiced serial killer opposite Al Pacino in "Insomnia" a few years back -- brr! Scary as hell! Live Action, though? The jury is out on that one.

[]:             Quote Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:18 am I just got here, eva monkey. Give me a break.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:22 am Mortician69 wrote: I just got here, eva monkey. Give me a break.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:29 am Mortician69 wrote: I just got here, eva monkey. Give me a break.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:36 am Xard wrote: Don't be offended by EM. He is just being EM, he ain't really mean :)

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:41 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Xard wrote: Don't be offended by EM. He is just being EM, he ain't really mean :)

[]:             Quote Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:42 am Green? Super green

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:56 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I WANT CAKE.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:00 am As much I enjoy him as a actor, I don't see him as Gendo but I think he would make a decent Kozo IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Nov 03, 2009 12:40 pm Wes Anderson said NGE is one of the finer works out there.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Nov 03, 2009 12:47 pm Uriel Septim VII wrote: Wes Anderson said NGE is one of the finer works out there.
summary:
[]: Robin Williams loves NGE             Quote Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 8:51 am I find that interesting If he were in a live action Eva movie, who would he portray?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 8:56 am Lilith would be my pick

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 03, 2009
